programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: I can still hear their screams
programme.desc: Stories of people who realize that they have been dealing with a murderer for years.Suddenly they are faced with a choice between loyalty and justice.They must decide which side to choose.

programme.title: Murders in Silicon Valley
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath 2
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath 2
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.sub-title: Dig a hole and say a prayer!
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: The program includes behind the scenes of true crimes and confessions of relatives of brutally murdered victims.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: The program includes behind the scenes of true crimes and confessions of relatives of brutally murdered victims.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks 2
programme.desc: Visiting the homes of murderers can give you chills.Conversations with prisoners serving sentences for crimes are a controversial and can be traumatic experience.

programme.desc: Visiting the homes of murderers can give you chills.Conversations with prisoners serving sentences for crimes are a controversial and can be traumatic experience.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones 5
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a journalist of the New York Times, returns to high-profile crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Conducts its own investigations.

programme.title: Web of Lies 3
programme.desc: Dark stories that serve as a warning against making friends in cyberspace.The characters of the series are people who fell into the trap of dangerous criminals looking for victims on the Internet.

programme.desc: Dark stories that serve as a warning against making friends in cyberspace.The characters of the series are people who fell into the trap of dangerous criminals looking for victims on the Internet.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates 3
programme.desc: The third series of stories about crime cases that gained notoriety by being published in magazines.Journalists reveal the behind-the-scenes of the crime and present the profile of the criminal.

programme.title: Feds
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: Body Cam 2
programme.desc: The program includes a behind-the-scenes look at police work from the perspective of officers' video recordings.Viewers will see surprising, dangerous and blood-curdling cases of cases that are far from routine.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: The series shows situations in which instinct prevailed over logical thinking and ethics, which led to the commission of criminal acts.

programme.title: Extreme Forensics 2
programme.desc: The second series of a documentary series revealing the behind-the-scenes of detectives' work.In the program we will hear about the strangest crimes whose perpetrators were caught thanks to modern technology.

programme.title: Chaos in Court
programme.desc: In the courtroom, situations often arise when nervous people lose their temper.Viewers will learn about the everyday life of lawyers, judges, prosecutors and forensic psychologists.

programme.title: Shattered 3
programme.desc: Viewers will see what impact cruel crimes and offenses have on the lives of victims and witnesses, as well as what the consequences are for those involved.
